news.Title: 5 Warren Buffett Stocks to Hold Forever
news.Content: Warren Buffett is no longer the CEO of his investment vehicle, Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE: BRKA) (NYSE: BRKB) , but the celebrated investor is leaving a long shadow. In fact, many of the company's stock positions in its equity portfolio were opened during his long tenure as its leader. New(ish) CEO Greg Abel has already left his mark on the company as its chief, but the portfolio is still anchored by Buffett -era picks. Of this clutch of stocks, five stand out as investments to own for a lifetime -- American Express (NYSE: AXP) , Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL) , ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Warren Buffett's investment vehicle, Berkshire Hathaway, continues to hold significant stakes in long-term growth stocks like Alphabet and Apple.
• Alphabet's revenue has grown from under $258 billion to nearly $403 billion in five years, with net income at $132 billion last year, driven by search, AI, and cloud.
• Apple's services ecosystem and popular high-end products, including the iPhone, continue to drive revenue growth, with its stake in Apple being Berkshire's largest position at over $70 billion.
news.Keywords: long-term investment, value investing, portfolio holdings, revenue growth, AI technology

news.Title: Analysis-In China, AMD CEO Lisa Su is understated while Nvidia's Huang is more razzmatazz
news.Content: By Eduardo Baptista and Liam Mo BEIJING, May 29 (Reuters) - When AMD CEO Lisa Su arrived in China last week just days after Nvidia 's CEO left, she kept a much lower profile than Jensen Huang, who drew crowds in the centre of the capital as he posed for photos and ate local ‌delicacies like Beijing-style soybean paste noodles. Their contrasting approaches show two very different forms of corporate diplomacy around the world's ...
news.AI_Summary:
• AMD CEO Lisa Su adopted a low-profile approach in China compared to Nvidia's Jensen Huang, reflecting diverging strategies in the sensitive AI chip market.
• Nvidia's market share in China has fallen to near zero due to U.S. export controls, while AMD holds 4% and offers a broader range of products beyond AI accelerators.
• AMD's China revenue accounts for about 20% of its total, and the company is promoting its ROCm software stack to Chinese developers as an alternative to Nvidia's CUDA.
news.Keywords: geopolitical risk, market share, export controls, AI chips, corporate diplomacy

news.Title: Opinion: The Stock Market May Have Dodged a Bullet With Jerome Powell Staying at the Fed

news.Title: The SpaceX IPO Is Coming Next Month: Here's What You Need to Know

The company finally released its investor prospectus last week, giving followers a peek into what's actually happening at SpaceX. Here are the important details every potential investor needs to know before buying SpaceX stock . Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue » 1. Starlink is leading revenue SpaceX ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SpaceX's investor prospectus reveals details ahead of its upcoming IPO, including revenue streams from rocket launches, Starlink, and xAI.
• SpaceX reported revenue of $4.1 billion (rocket), $11.4 billion (Starlink), and $3.2 billion (xAI) in 2025.
• Starlink revenue increased 32% YoY in Q1 2026, with subscribers growing to 10.3 million, though average revenue per user declined.

news.Content: NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) is one of the 12 Most Profitable Stocks to Invest In . news.AI_Summary:
• NVIDIA reported Q1 adjusted EPS of $1.87 and revenue of $81.6B, exceeding consensus estimates.
• Raymond James raised its price target to $330 and maintained a Strong Buy rating, citing strong Q1 results, Q2 guidance, inference-led growth, and share gains.
• BofA also raised its price target to $350, maintained a Buy rating, and increased FY27/FY28 EPS estimates by 9% and 15% respectively.

news.Keywords: Q1 earnings beat, price target raise, inference growth, AI factories, agentic AI

news.Title: Blackstone (BX) to Invest $5B in TPU Cloud Joint Venture with Google

(NYSE:BX) announced a joint venture with Google to create a new U.S.-based company offering data center capacity, operations, networking, and Google Cloud’s tensor processing units, or TPUs, as ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Blackstone is investing $5 billion in a joint venture with Google to offer data center capacity, operations, networking, and Google Cloud's TPUs as a service.
• The new company will provide access to cloud TPUs outside of Google Cloud, with the first 500 MW of capacity expected online in 2027.
• TD Cowen lowered its price target on Blackstone (BX) to $133 but maintained a Buy rating, citing climbing long-term earnings power in the alternative asset manager sector.

news.Title: Best 3 Blue Chip Stocks to Buy After a Market Pullback -- Including Microsoft (MSFT) Stock
news.Content: It's tempting to want to fill your portfolio with lots of growth stocks. The best do offer chances at astronomical returns -- but they can also be overvalued and just as likely to pull back as to advance. So consider including some blue chip stocks in your mix. A blue chip stock is one tied to a relatively stable, large, established company. blue chip stocks often pay dividends, which can be a big plus. While they may not grow as briskly as some growth stocks will, they can be less volatile. Actually, some blue chip stocks offer impressive growth, too! ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Microsoft (MSFT) is presented as a blue-chip stock with growth potential, currently trading at an attractive forward P/E ratio of 22, below its five-year average.
• Despite increased capital expenditures on AI, the stock is considered discounted and offers a growing dividend yield of 0.9%.
• The article mentions a report on a company providing critical technology for Nvidia and Intel, without naming it.
• Becton, Dickinson (BDX) and Clorox (CLX) are also mentioned as blue-chip stock considerations.
news.Keywords: blue chip stocks, market pullback, AI investments, dividend yield, diversified business

news.Title: Analysis-Huawei bets on speed over shrinking transistors to sidestep US chip sanctions
news.Content: By Eduardo Baptista and Che Pan BEIJING, May 29 (Reuters) - Huawei's new chip design principle focused on boosting transmission speed rather than continuing to shrink semiconductors offers a path for China to build cutting-edge chips despite U.S. sanctions, though whether it represents a true breakthrough remains to be seen. More from Yahoo Scout What challenges does Huawei's new approach face? How do U.S. sanctions impact China's chipmaking? What is Huawei's Tau Scaling Law approach? Is LogicFolding truly different from ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Huawei is developing a new chip design approach focused on transmission speed (Tau Scaling Law) to circumvent US sanctions, rather than shrinking transistors.
• This method, using techniques like LogicFolding, aims to improve chip density, efficiency, and clock speeds, potentially extending progress beyond Moore's Law.
• Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang commented that Huawei's approach is not a threat to TSMC, as TSMC has been using advanced 3D packaging for years.
• Analysts caution that stacking multiple chip layers increases power density and risks overheating, and that production yields and costs remain significant barriers.
news.Keywords: US sanctions, chip design, Tau Scaling Law, advanced packaging, TSMC

news.Title: Barclays resets Marvell stock price target after earnings
news.Content: Marvell Technology has gained more than 200% in the past 12 months. It just reported record revenue, guided above expectations, and told investors that growth would accelerate every single quarter through the rest of the fiscal year. For Barclays analyst Tom O'Malley, that was enough to nearly double his price target in a single note. What Barclays changed and the numbers driving it O'Malley raised his price target on Marvell Technology ( MRVL ) to $275 from $150 and maintained his overweight rating following the company's Q1 FY2027 earnings release on ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Barclays raised its price target on Marvell Technology (MRVL) to $275 from $150, maintaining an overweight rating, citing strong Q1 FY2027 earnings and upward revisions to fiscal 2027/2028 outlooks.
• Marvell expects its data center business to grow 50% in FY2027 and 55% in FY2028, with interconnect revenue projected to rise over 70% year-over-year in FY2027.
• Custom silicon revenue is expected to exceed $10 billion by 2028, driven by demand from hyperscalers.
• Marvell reported record Q1 FY2027 revenue of $2.42 billion, up 9% sequentially, with the data center segment leading growth.
news.Keywords: price target increase, data center growth, custom silicon, interconnect revenue, earnings beat

news.Content: 聯發科 (2454-TW) 今 (29) 日舉行股東會，股東關注資料中心 ASIC 業務發展及晶圓代工策略。董事長蔡明介表示，資料中心是很大的成長機會，聯發科今年 ASIC 出貨目標為 20 億美元，明年則將進一步成長至數十億美元規模；副董事 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 聯發科預計今年ASIC（客製化晶片）出貨目標為20億美元，明年將進一步成長至數十億美元規模。
• 董事長蔡明介強調，資料中心是很大的成長機會，ASIC業務將快速成長，但手機業務仍具戰略地位。
• 副董事長蔡力行重申台積電是聯發科最重要、最長期的晶圓代工夥伴，雙方合作涵蓋從12奈米至1.4奈米先進製程及先進封裝。
• 聯發科將持續投資AI關鍵技術，並與台積電緊密合作高階製程、先進封裝、HBM及IVR等技術，以支援新世代AI應用。
news.Keywords: ASIC,資料中心,晶圓代工,先進製程,AI布局

news.Title: 不甩三星李在鎔來台搶單！聯發科蔡力行「一席話」力挺台積電
news.Content: 在台積電先進製程與先進封裝產能持續吃緊之際，市場也傳出其他晶圓代工與封裝業者積極爭取客戶訂單。近期包含三星會長李在鎔低調訪台，被解讀為可 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 聯發科董事長蔡明介明確表示，與台積電的長期合作關係穩固，雙方累積深厚默契，互利夥伴關係並未改變。
• 面對三星會長李在鎔訪台洽談合作機會，聯發科重申對台積電的倚賴，強調雙方合作關係從12奈米一路延伸至未來的1.4奈米。
• 執行長蔡力行表示，雖然會關注其他廠商的產能與技術，但台積電仍是聯發科目前最重要、最長期的合作夥伴。
• 聯發科強調，公司會依實際需要評估與其他廠商的合作機會，但現階段台積電仍是首選。
news.Keywords: 晶圓代工,合作夥伴,先進製程,供應鏈,策略聯盟

news.Title: 蔡明介：漲價成產業鏈新常態　聯發科會考慮調整價格

• 聯發科品牌價值大幅提升，首度進入全球前十大最有價值的半導體品牌，將持續深化全球布局。

news.Title: Veteran analyst has blunt message on Sandisk stock after massive rally
news.Content: Shares of Sandisk have been on a massive run this year as investors continue piling into artificial intelligence-related memory and storage names. Sandisk stock is up 591% year to date and closed at $1,641 on May 28, according to Yahoo Finance data . The rally accelerated this week after Micron Technology ( MU ) surged 19% on May 26 following a major price target increase from UBS , fueling another wave of momentum across the broader memory sector. UBS analyst Timothy ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Sandisk (SNDK) stock has rallied 591% year-to-date, driven by investor enthusiasm for AI-related memory and storage.
• Barclays analyst upgraded SNDK to overweight with a price target of $2,300, citing strong demand for memory and storage products through 2027.

news.Title: Samsung Electronics ships faster HBM4E chip samples to customers; shares jump
news.Content: By Heekyong Yang SEOUL, May 29 (Reuters) - Samsung Electronics on Friday said it started shipping samples of its latest high-bandwidth memory (HBM) chip to customers, pulling ahead of rivals in distributing a new version of the product critical to ‌AI data centers and sending its shares higher. The South Korean tech company said the new chip, the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Samsung Electronics has begun shipping samples of its new 12-layer HBM4E chip, which is over 20% faster than previous HBM4 products.
• This move aims to regain market momentum in the AI memory chip sector, particularly for supplying Nvidia, after falling behind rivals like SK Hynix and Micron.
• Samsung's shares rose 6.5% on the news, with analysts citing optimism for its AI chip business and a strategic partnership with Anthropic.
• Market share in Q4 2025 was led by SK Hynix (57%), followed by Samsung (22%) and Micron (21%), with Samsung aiming to shift this structure with HBM4E.
news.Keywords: HBM4E, AI data centers, memory chips, market share, early mover advantage

news.Title: 5-star analyst sets jaw-dropping Nvidia stock price target
news.Content: Nvidia ( NVDA ) stock closed at $212.6 on May 27, down 9.81% from its highest closing price of $235.74 on May 14. The dip comes as a result of a common pattern of volatility for the stock near its earnings report. Nvidia reported its first quarter (Q1) fiscal year 2027 earnings on May 20. Nvidia did two things to try to prevent the dip. The company confirmed an additional $80.0 billion in share repurchase authorization and increased its quarterly cash dividend from $0.01 per ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia (NVDA) reported record Q1 FY2027 results, driven by AI factory demand and increasing capital expenditures from hyperscalers.
• Tigress Financial analyst Ivan Feinseth reiterated a strong buy rating and raised his price target to $425 from $360, implying nearly 100% upside.
• Bank of America analysts believe NVDA is trading below its historical PE multiples, suggesting undervaluation relative to growth potential.
• Nvidia confirmed an $80 billion share repurchase authorization and increased its quarterly dividend, but experienced post-earnings volatility.
news.Keywords: AI infrastructure, hyperscalers, capital expenditures, price target, earnings report

news.Title: 風評：台股衝上44000點　我們正在為後代種什麼樹？
news.Content: 一棵參天大樹能長成今天的模樣，從來不是 一朝一夕之功 ，而是數十年前有人在烈日下掘土、埋種、澆灌的結果。今天台灣引以為傲的半導體產業與AI供應鏈榮景，正是那一輩人在最艱困的年代裡，為我們種下的「乘涼樹」。我們今天所享有的經濟 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 文章探討台灣半導體產業與AI供應鏈的榮景，並追溯其發展歷程，認為是數十年前的戰略佈局成果。
• 作者質疑當代是否僅在收割前人成果，並未為後代種下新的成長樹木，尤其在AI時代的社會結構劇烈變動下。
• 文章指出，AI的指數級成長將導致比「數位鴻溝」更殘酷的「AI鴻溝」，掌握AI者將指數級累積財富與話語權。
• 作者批評部分政治人物過於關注短期選票與GDP數據，缺乏當年「不計任期、只問國運」的戰略決心，並擔憂政治人物利用AI同溫層效應進行社會分化。
news.Keywords: AI鴻溝,產業發展,戰略佈局,社會分化,世代傳承

news.Title: AI耗電激增　台積電：能源效率成晶片發展關鍵
news.Content: （中央社阿姆斯特丹2026年5月28日綜合外電報導）台積電高層主管今天指出，人工智慧（AI）帶動的用電需求激增，已使能源效率而非運算能力，成為未來電腦晶片發展的主要限制因素 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台積電高層主管指出，AI帶動的用電需求激增，已使能源效率成為未來晶片發展的關鍵限制因素，而非單純的運算能力。
• 客戶越來越重視「在不增加耗電下提升效能」，因為電力成本與供電可得性是營運商面臨的壓力。
• 台積電預計從2奈米製程到2028年的A14製程世代，晶片耗電量可降低最多30%，運算效能提升20%以上。
• 除了提高電晶體密度，先進封裝、晶片堆疊及光子技術等方案正變得愈來愈重要以提升效率。
• 文章也提及中國競爭對手華為的「韜（τ）定律」計畫，並指出其受限於無法取得EUV設備，凸顯能源效率對次世代AI晶片的重要性。
news.Keywords: AI,能源效率,晶片發展,製程技術,功耗

news.Title: 智寶AI動畫助手AIFRED導入聯發科技術，搶食全球動畫商機
news.Content: 【財訊快報／記者戴海茜報導】近年隨著動畫、遊戲屢創現象級熱潮，智寶國際(7824)AI動畫助手AIFRED導 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 智寶國際（7824）將其AI動畫助手AIFRED導入聯發科技（2454）的LoRA Fusion技術，以搶攻全球動畫市場商機。
• 此技術能直接在PC或行動裝置上執行文生圖，快速生成幾乎無損的圖像，預計2030年全球動畫市場規模將達600.7億美元。
• AIFRED結合了聯發科技的裝置端生成式AI技術、中雍科技AI MEMC動態補償技術，以及JP GAMES的PWK開發套件，旨在提高動畫師生產力並快速生成3D角色。
• 智寶國際強調，AIFRED整合聯發科技GenAI Security加密技術，可在認證裝置上生成具特定特徵的角色，確保IP安全並防止未經授權的複製與分發。
news.Keywords: AI動畫,生成式AI,技術合作,市場商機,IP保護

news.Title: 2 AI Infrastructure Stocks That Could Rise 25% and 80% Despite Overdone Spending Fears
news.Content: Two of the hottest stocks in the market right now are Advanced Micro Devices (NASDAQ: AMD) and Micron (NASDAQ: MU) . And according to some Wall Street analysts, these stocks still have more room to run. Baird analyst Tristan Gerra has a street-high $625 price target on AMD, up from $300 ahead of the company's early May earnings report, representing about 25% from here (as of ...
news.AI_Summary:

• Micron (MU) has a price target of $1,625 from UBS, indicating approximately 80% upside, fueled by the memory supercycle and HBM demand.
• AMD is well-positioned for growth in inference and agentic AI markets, leveraging its chiplet design and large GPU deals, and sees opportunity in the data center CPU market.
• Micron benefits from a tight DRAM market due to surging HBM demand, leading to sales growth and margin expansion, with ASML machine bottlenecks constraining supply.

news.Title: Ford Stock Is Moving Like Tesla Now. Its Results Can’t Justify the Premium.
news.Content: Ford (F) stock has traded in a tight price channel over the last five years. It has tended to bottom near $10, while witnessing selling pressure above $15. However, the stock has rallied over the last month and is now trading at the highest price level in nearly four years. The rally is a welcome break for investors. The only succor has been the generous dividends, which the company has topped up with special dividends in the previous three years to meet its ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Ford's stock price action, particularly its recent rally, is being compared to Tesla's due to its newly launched energy storage business.
• Ford's energy storage business is seen as an 'AI play' with potential for strong growth driven by data center power demand and the need for energy storage systems.
• Ford plans annual capacity of 20 GWh for its energy storage systems starting next year, which is less than half of Tesla's current annual deployment.
• Despite the rally and optimism around the energy storage business, some analysts like Barclays believe Ford's recent gains have been 'overdone', and Morgan Stanley has a $14 target price.
news.Keywords: energy storage, AI play, market comparison, legacy automaker, valuation concerns

news.Title: Australian watchdog sues Amazon unit over children's backpack safety
news.Content: May 29 (Reuters) - Australia's competition watchdog said on Friday that it has initiated legal action against Amazon's local unit, alleging breaches ‌of product safety labelling laws related to children's backpacks. According to ‌the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Australia's competition watchdog is suing Amazon's local unit for alleged breaches of product safety labelling laws concerning children's backpacks with button batteries.
• The Australian Competition and Consumer Commission (ACCC) alleges that 'Unicorn Toddler Backpacks' were supplied without mandatory safety warning labels for button batteries.
• 41 backpacks were sold to consumers, and 267 units were held in Amazon's fulfillment centers between June 22 and November 1, 2022.
• The ACCC is seeking penalties, declarations, and costs, marking its first Federal Court case against an online marketplace for mandatory product safety law breaches.
news.Keywords: product safety, regulatory action, consumer law, button batteries, compliance breach

news.Title: Anthropic Just Delivered Spectacular News For Amazon and Alphabet
news.Content: It isn't quite David defeating Goliath, but Anthropic just did something few would have thought possible a few years ago. The company is now the most valuable AI start-up in the world, surpassing OpenAI with its latest funding round. The owner of the Claude chatbot just closed its Series H round, valuing the company at $965 billion. Anthropic raised $65 billion from investors, including ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Anthropic, an AI startup, has raised $65 billion in its latest funding round, valuing the company at $965 billion, surpassing OpenAI.
• Amazon (AMZN) and Alphabet (GOOGL) are significant investors in Anthropic, with Amazon investing $13 billion (with a further $20 billion pledged) and Alphabet investing up to $40 billion (on top of $13 billion already invested).
• Anthropic's revenue run rate reached $47 billion, and its new Claude Opus 4.8 model outperforms other publicly available AI platforms in benchmarks.
• The funding will be used to expand compute capacity, including significant cloud infrastructure spending with Amazon Web Services (AWS) and Google Cloud.
• Anthropic has pledged to spend $100 billion on AWS and $200 billion on Google Cloud over the next five to ten years.
news.Keywords: AI startup, venture capital, cloud infrastructure, strategic investment, valuation

news.Title: Intel Has Tripled in 2026. Here's 1 Reason It Could Keep Going.
news.Content: A year ago, Intel (NASDAQ: INTC) looked like a company investors had given up on. Its stock briefly traded below $18, its foundry business was bleeding cash, and rivals had lapped it in the race to power artificial intelligence (AI) . So far in 2026, though, the chipmaker has staged one of the more improbable comebacks in big tech, with shares up about 225% as of this writing. Plenty of headlines have fueled the move. There's a reported preliminary agreement to ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Intel (INTC) shares have risen approximately 225% year-to-date, driven by a potential agreement to make chips for Apple and significant cloud customer deals.
• A key catalyst is the increasing importance of CPUs in the AI era, particularly for inference and agentic AI workloads, playing to Intel's core strength.
• Intel's Data Center and AI division revenue grew 22% year-over-year to $5.1 billion, with operating margins more than doubling to ~31%.
• The company's AI-related businesses constitute about 60% of revenue and grew 40% year-over-year last quarter.
• Challenges remain, including a GAAP net loss of $3.7 billion last quarter and a $2.4 billion loss in its foundry unit, with the stock trading at a high valuation.
news.Keywords: CPU, AI workloads, data center, foundry business, valuation

news.Title: Nvidia Already is the GPU Giant. Now It's Aiming to Dominate in a New $200 Billion Market.
news.Content: Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) has built much of its success thanks to one key product: the graphics processing unit (GPU). This is the chip driving key AI tasks such as the training and inference of large language models, and while other companies sell GPUs and similar chips, Nvidia's have consistently been the fastest and most efficient. As a result, customers have rushed to get in on the company's GPUs and latest updates -- and this ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia (NVDA) is targeting a new $200 billion market with its upcoming Vera Rubin platform, which includes a stand-alone CPU.
• The company expects $20 billion in stand-alone CPU sales this year, aiming to become the leading CPU supplier.
• Nvidia's GPUs are crucial for AI training and inference, driving significant earnings growth; Q1 revenue climbed 85% to $81 billion, and net income advanced 211% to $58 billion.
• The CPU's growing importance in agentic AI, which involves AI taking actions to solve problems, presents a new growth opportunity.
• Dominating both GPU and CPU markets could significantly boost Nvidia's future revenue and expand its market opportunities.
news.Keywords: CPU, GPU, AI market, revenue growth, new market

news.Title: Micron Surges 850% As It Crosses $1 Trillion Valuation
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Micron Technology ( NASDAQ:MU ) has entered rare air. The memory-chip maker's rally has pushed its market value above $1 trillion for the first time, ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Micron Technology (MU) has surpassed a $1 trillion market valuation, marking the fastest such increase on record (48 trading days).
• The surge is driven by strong investor demand for companies involved in AI infrastructure buildout, particularly memory-related semiconductors.
• Micron's shares have gained nearly 850% over the past 12 months, significantly outperforming the Nasdaq 100 and the Philadelphia Semiconductor Index.
• The company's market cap doubled from $500 billion to $1 trillion in just 48 trading days, outpacing historical records set by Samsung and Tesla.
• Analysts expect accelerating earnings growth, with projected adjusted EPS of $105 by fiscal 2027, a more than 1,200% increase from fiscal 2025.
news.Keywords: memory chips, AI infrastructure, market capitalization, valuation, earnings growth

news.Title: Micron Gets Higher Target From DA Davidson

• The firm suggests a potential shift in how investors view the memory chip market, moving away from a purely commodity-based, cyclical model.
• Increasing reliance on high-bandwidth memory in AI data centers makes Micron's role more critical and potentially less interchangeable.
• Other analysts from UBS, Barclays, and Mizuho have also raised targets, citing strong AI-related memory demand and improved long-term earnings visibility.
• The key question for investors is whether sustained AI demand can maintain strong memory pricing and support higher earnings and cash flow.
news.Keywords: price target, memory market, AI data centers, earnings visibility, valuation

news.Title: Wiwynn Warns AI Supply Crunch Could Last Until 2027-2028

• Demand for data center hardware remains high due to increased capital spending from major customers like Meta Platforms (META) and Microsoft.

news.Title: Inflation Just Spiked to the Highest Level in Almost 3 Years in the First Report Under New Fed Chair Kevin Warsh. But There Was Some Good News
news.Content: The Federal Reserve’s preferred gauge of inflation came in at the highest level in nearly three years. However, new Fed Chair Kevin Warsh’s first inflation report also contained some good news. The April reading of the personal consumption expenditures price index (PCE) increased 0.4% in April and 3.8% year over year. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? news.AI_Summary:
• The Federal Reserve's preferred inflation gauge, the PCE price index, rose 0.4% in April and 3.8% year-over-year, reaching a nearly three-year high.
• Core PCE increased 0.2% monthly and 3.3% annually; however, the monthly gains were slightly below economists' projections.
• Higher energy prices, housing, and utilities contributed to the increase, with housing and utilities up 0.6% month-over-month.
• While inflation remains above the Fed's 2% target, the softer-than-expected monthly figures may offer some relief.
• The report is unlikely to significantly alter the Fed's interest rate trajectory, with markets still expecting rates to remain unchanged in the near term.
news.Keywords: inflation, PCE, Federal Reserve, interest rates, economic indicators

news.Title: Robots, Drones, and Physical AI: How to Invest in LiDAR’s Second Act
news.Content: For years, the LiDAR (Light Detection and Ranging) investment story revolved around one idea: autonomous vehicles (AVs). Capital poured into the space through special purpose acquisition vehicles (SPACs) and early-stage listings, all tied to the long-dated promise of self-driving cars. But the market has shifted – quietly at first, as it often does, and then all at once. Today, LiDAR is evolving into the core perception layer for robotics, drones, and physical AI systems, expanding far beyond automotive and creating a broader, more immediate set of investment opportunities in publicly traded markets. More News from Barchart Dear Intel Stock Fans, ...
news.AI_Summary:
• LiDAR technology is expanding beyond autonomous vehicles (AVs) into robotics, drones, and physical AI systems, creating new investment opportunities.
• Robotics-related LiDAR shipments now exceed automotive ADAS volumes, indicating a shift towards higher-volume, faster adoption curves in automation and logistics.
• Technological advancements include cost compression and performance improvements in solid-state and FMCW LiDAR, enabling smaller, more efficient, and longer-range systems (4D LiDAR).
• Expanding use cases for LiDAR-equipped drones include infrastructure inspection, precision agriculture, industrial applications, and mining, driven by demand from sectors like AI data centers.
news.Keywords: LiDAR, robotics, physical AI, drones, investment theme

news.Title: ARM Stock Is Valued for Eternity, But Silicon Has an Expiration Date
news.Content: Looking at the current valuation of Arm Holdings (ARM), the word “astronomical" comes to mind. Arm's market capitalization currently stands at $319 billion. If we glance into the fundamentals, the scale of investors' optimism becomes even more obvious; Arm's annual revenue is around $4.9 billion, while net profit is roughly $900 million. Yes, gross profit sits at an impressive $4.8 billion, ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Arm Holdings (ARM) currently has an 'astronomical' valuation with a market cap of $319 billion against annual revenue of $4.9 billion and net profit of $900 million, resulting in a P/E ratio of 365.
• The company's business model relies on intellectual property (IP) royalties from Arm-based chip production, giving it a dominant position in the current silicon architecture.
• A significant risk to Arm's valuation is the approaching physical limits of traditional silicon chip technology (Moore's Law), with potential paradigm shifts to new technologies like photonic or quantum processors.
• Arm's current IP is tied to silicon, and there is no guarantee of rights to future replacement technologies, suggesting its 'eternal' valuation may be unsustainable due to technological obsolescence.
news.Keywords: valuation, P/E ratio, intellectual property, technological limits, paradigm shift

news.Title: If You Had Invested $1,000 in Micron 1 Year Ago, Here's How Much You'd Have Now. Is the Stock Still a Buy?
news.Content: Few investors a year ago would have predicted that Micron Technology (NASDAQ: MU) would deliver one of the U.S. stock market's most extraordinary 12-month runs. The shares traded in the mid-$90s as recently as late May 2025, and memory chips still carried the reputation of being one of the most cyclical corners of the semiconductor industry. A boom-and-bust pattern had defined the business for decades. But the 12 months that followed have rewritten that ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Micron Technology has experienced an extraordinary 850% stock gain over the past year, turning a $1,000 investment into approximately $9,500.
• The surge is attributed to the AI boom, leading to unprecedented demand for Micron's high-bandwidth memory (HBM).
• Fiscal Q2 2026 revenue nearly tripled year-over-year to $23.86 billion, with net income jumping to $13.79 billion and adjusted gross margin reaching ~75%.
• Management guidance for fiscal Q3 2026 revenue is approximately $33.5 billion, implying ~260% year-over-year growth, with HBM supply for 2026 effectively sold out.
news.Keywords: AI boom, high-bandwidth memory, revenue growth, margin expansion, semiconductor cycle

news.Title: Rational exuberance: Inside Washington’s $2 billion quantum gamble
news.Content: The U.S. Department of Commerce recently sent shockwaves through the technology sector by signing letters of intent to inject $2 billion into nine quantum computing and hardware companies under the CHIPS and Science Act. The capital allocation includes a massive $1 billion commitment to a newly formed IBM subsidiary, alongside substantial stakes in pure-play firms like GlobalFoundries, Rigetti Computing, and D-Wave Quantum. Yet it was not the dollar amount that triggered a parabolic surge in publicly traded quantum stocks—it was the unprecedented structure of the deal. Rather than issuing traditional research grants, the administration is taking minority equity stakes in ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The U.S. Department of Commerce is injecting $2 billion into nine quantum computing and hardware companies via the CHIPS and Science Act, taking minority equity stakes.
• A significant portion, $1 billion, is allocated to an IBM subsidiary, with other investments in companies like GlobalFoundries, Rigetti Computing, and D-Wave Quantum.
• This 'government-as-shareholder' model represents a policy shift towards direct government ownership in strategically critical sectors.
• Industry practitioners view the federal involvement as a validation of the quantum computing space, citing national security and AI leadership as key drivers.
news.Keywords: quantum computing, government investment, equity stakes, CHIPS Act, strategic sectors

news.Title: Is Nvidia the Next Apple?
news.Content: In the world of technology investing, few companies have commanded the level of cultural and financial dominance that Apple (NASDAQ: AAPL) achieved during the first two decades of the 21st century. From the iPod to the iPhone, it delivered an impressive run of must-have devices that redefined entire hardware categories. Yet once the smartphone market matured and rival products became competitive, Apple's hypergrowth phase gave way to a more measured expansion supported by services, ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The article draws parallels between Nvidia's current growth phase driven by AI and Apple's historical dominance in the smartphone market.
• It suggests Nvidia, like Apple, may be transitioning from hypergrowth to a more mature expansion phase, characterized by valuation compression and share buybacks.
• While Nvidia's data center revenue and margins have exploded due to AI, its stock's valuation expansion has moderated.
• The piece highlights Nvidia's untapped opportunities beyond data centers, including CPUs, networking, autonomous driving, and robotics, suggesting it's not yet at a post-innovation plateau.
• Apple's transition involved shifting focus to services and aggressive share repurchases to drive EPS growth when hardware innovation slowed.
news.Keywords: AI growth, market maturation, valuation compression, share buybacks, diversification

news.Title: Micron Technology Just Proved the AI Memory Boom Is Not Cyclical. Here's Why.
news.Content: Micron Technology 's (NASDAQ: MU) meteoric rise over the last year marks more than just a generic bullish upgrade in the semiconductor industry. news.AI_Summary:
• Micron Technology's (MU) recent performance challenges the historical view of memory chip demand being cyclical, driven by structural changes in the AI market.
• AI infrastructure requires continuous High-Bandwidth Memory (HBM) supply, leading hyperscalers to prioritize securing memory over price, creating a demand floor.
• Micron is utilizing long-term agreements with committed volumes and partial price protection, providing predictable revenue streams and reducing inventory risk.
• These contracts enable more deliberate capital expenditure planning, translating into margin expansion and earnings durability, moving away from cyclical tailwinds.
• An analyst raised Micron's price target to $1,625, indicating a belief that the company is a core pillar of the AI infrastructure era, not just experiencing a cyclical wave.
news.Keywords: structural demand, AI infrastructure, HBM, long-term agreements, earnings durability

news.Title: Should You Buy the Vanguard S&P 500 ETF With the Stock Market at a Record High? History Offers a Clear Answer.
news.Content: The S&P 500 (SNPINDEX: ^GSPC) is a highly diversified stock market index. It tracks 500 companies across 11 sectors of the economy, so it often provides a broad representation of the performance of the American corporate sector. The S&P 500 recently fell as much as 9% from its peak over concerns about how the conflict between the U.S. and Iran would affect the energy market. The index has since recovered fully, thanks to a ceasefire between ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The S&P 500 (SPX) has recovered from a recent dip and shows a year-to-date gain of 9.8%, driven significantly by the Information Technology sector.
• The Information Technology sector, heavily weighted by companies like Nvidia, Apple, and Microsoft, has seen its performance boosted by explosive demand for AI chips, software, and cloud services.
• Excluding the IT sector, the S&P 500's five-year return drops from 78% to 47%, underscoring AI's importance to the current bull market.
• While history suggests continued upside for the Vanguard S&P 500 ETF (VOO), current valuation (21.8x forward earnings) may lead to below-average returns over the next decade, alongside macroeconomic risks like inflation.
news.Keywords: S&P 500, Information Technology, AI demand, market valuation, macroeconomic risk

news.Title: Jim Cramer has bold new take on Elon Musk's SpaceX IPO
news.Content: There is always one IPO that defines a generation of investors. For people who started buying stocks in the 1990s, it was Microsoft ( MSFT ) and Amazon ( AMZN ). For millennials, it was Facebook and Tesla ( TSLA ). Each one arrived with the same problem, a valuation that looked impossible right up until it didn't. Elon Musk 's SpaceX , which has spent nearly a decade as the most-anticipated private company in the world, is about to test the next generation of buyers. SpaceX filed its IPO prospectus on May 20 and is targeting a June 12 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SpaceX's upcoming IPO is targeting a valuation range of $1.75 trillion to $2 trillion, potentially making it the largest IPO in history.
• Jim Cramer expressed skepticism about the valuation, citing a revenue multiple of approximately 110 times trailing sales, higher than Tesla's at its IPO.
• SpaceX reported $18.7 billion in 2025 revenue (up 33% YoY) but a net loss of $4.94 billion, largely due to $12.7 billion in data center spending for its xAI division.
• Potential catalysts for the bull case include Starship's payload delivery, a $1.25 billion/month compute capacity lease deal with Anthropic, and the potential acquisition of AI startup Cursor.
• The market is evaluating whether SpaceX will be the next Nvidia or WeWork, with significant risks and potential rewards associated with its ambitious valuation and growth initiatives.
news.Keywords: IPO valuation, revenue growth, net loss, capital expenditure, speculative investment

news.Title: From diapers to drugs: How India's global corporate hubs are putting AI to work
news.Content: By Shivansh Tiwary and Praveen Paramasivam May 28 (Reuters) - Whether they are recruiting the ideal "momfluencer" to sell diapers or trawling through reams of data to fast-track drug launches, global centers of multinational ‌firms in India are increasingly putting AI to work in creative ...
news.AI_Summary:

• Novo Nordisk and other pharmaceutical companies are deploying AI to expedite drug launch processes, analyze safety data, and improve commercial analytics.
news.Keywords: artificial intelligence, global capability centers, process automation, innovation, healthcare technology

news.Content: Micron’s ( MU ) rally has blown past every major memory stock boom of the past three decades. The memory chipmaker blasted past $1 trillion in market value Tuesday , notching its best day since November 2011 and turning one of the market’s most ...
news.AI_Summary:

• The rally is attributed to AI, with high-bandwidth memory (HBM) being treated as a critical bottleneck in AI build-outs rather than a commodity.
• While Nvidia still dominates the GPU market, investors are now focusing on supply chain components like HBM where capacity is tight and pricing power is visible.

news.Title: Taiwan Suspects Nvidia Chips Smuggled to China Via Japan
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- Taiwan prosecutors suspect that three individuals successfully smuggled at least one shipment of Nvidia Corp. AI chips to China after first exporting them to Japan, people familiar with the matter said. Most Read from Bloomberg Singapore Hands Byju's Founder His First Ever Jail Term Iran’s Khamenei Says No Going Back for Middle East Rocked by War Ex-President Biden Sues to Stop DOJ Sharing Interview Tapes Two More Oil Supertankers Exit Hormuz to Help Push Up Flows ‘KPop Demon Hunters’ Studio Draws Tencent Music ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Taiwan prosecutors suspect three individuals smuggled Nvidia AI chips to China via Japan, falsifying export documents for servers containing advanced Nvidia chips.
• This is Taiwan's first public crackdown on AI chip diversion, following US pressure to curtail China's access to advanced technology.
• At least one shipment of servers containing Nvidia chips allegedly went through Taiwan customs to Japan, then Hong Kong, a known waypoint to mainland China.
• The US has barred the sale of certain advanced AI chips to China without a license, aiming to prevent Beijing from gaining a military edge.
• Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang stated the company is rigorous in explaining regulations to its partners, and Super Micro is responsible for its own compliance.
news.Keywords: AI chip smuggling, export controls, supply chain security, regulatory enforcement, geopolitical risk

news.Title: Warren Buffett's Successor, Greg Abel, Buys an AI Stock That Poses a Threat to Nvidia
news.Content: Warren Buffett took control of Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE: BRKA) (NYSE: BRKB) in 1965. Under his leadership, the company grew into a multinational conglomerate worth more than $1 trillion, and the stock returned about 6,100,000%. Over the same period, the S&P 500 (SNPINDEX: ^GSPC) returned about 46,100%. After six decades, Buffett stepped down as Berkshire's CEO in December 2025 and handed the reins to Greg Abel, who previously served as vice chairman of noninsurance operations. Abel has already overseen major changes to ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Greg Abel, Warren Buffett's successor at Berkshire Hathaway, has tripled the company's stake in Alphabet (GOOGL), now representing nearly 7% of its portfolio.
• Alphabet's custom AI chips, Tensor Processing Units (TPUs), are positioned as a potential threat to Nvidia's dominance in the AI accelerator market.
• Alphabet is making TPUs available to Google Cloud customers and is now expanding access to select customers for deployment in their own data centers.
• Deals with Anthropic (tens of billions of dollars) and Meta Platforms (billions of dollars) highlight the significant demand for Google's TPUs.
• Despite Alphabet's efforts, Nvidia's GPUs and its CUDA platform maintain a dominant market share (over 80%) and a robust software ecosystem, posing a challenge for TPUs.
news.Keywords: AI chips, TPU, GPU, market share, competitive moat, cloud computing

news.Title: Micron’s Cheap Stock Valuation Seen as a Contrarian Warning Sign
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- Micron Technology Inc. is the third-best performer in the S&P 500 Index this year and at the same time one of the least expensive stocks in the market. While that dichotomy looks bullish on the surface, it may be more of a warning sign than a green light for investors. Most Read from Bloomberg Singapore Hands Byju's Founder His First Ever Jail Term Iran’s Khamenei Says No Going Back for Middle East Rocked by War Ex-President Biden Sues to Stop DOJ Sharing Interview Tapes Two More Oil Supertankers Exit Hormuz to Help Push Up Flows ‘KPop Demon Hunters’ ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Micron Technology is a top performer in the S&P 500 with a low valuation (10 times estimated earnings), which some analysts view as a contrarian warning sign.
• The company's revenue nearly tripled in its most recent quarter, and its stock has surged 1,003% since the end of 2024, reaching over $1 trillion in market capitalization.
• Historically, memory stocks have been cyclical commodities, with low valuations often signaling the peak of an earnings cycle.
• The debate is whether the massive AI infrastructure spending has fundamentally changed the industry's cyclical nature, potentially making Micron's low multiple a bargain.
• Companies like Microsoft, Amazon, Alphabet, and Meta are continuing significant capital expenditures, suggesting sustained demand for AI components.
news.Keywords: valuation, earnings growth, AI capex cycle, market cycle, contrarian indicator

• 外資買超前10大個股中，力積電、旺宏、南亞科等記憶體相關個股佔多數。
news.Keywords: 地緣政治風險,台股震盪,記憶體族群,外資賣超,油價上漲

news.Title: 童子賢罕見談台股不算過熱　AI浪潮連30%都不到
news.Content: 和碩（4938）今（28）日舉行股東會，董事長 童子賢 罕見對於台股近期頻創歷史新高，市場反而擔憂過熱跡象發表看法。他認為，若從上市公司獲利與本益比來看，目前台股仍具基本面支撐，尚未進入泡沫階段。他也指出，台灣處在AI潮流中心，現 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 和碩董事長童子賢認為，台股近期頻創歷史新高，但從上市公司獲利與本益比來看，尚未進入泡沫階段，仍具基本面支撐。
• 童子賢指出，台灣處在AI潮流中心，現階段發展連30%都不到，看好後續發展空間。
• AI浪潮帶動全球擴產潮，台灣位處供應鏈核心，從晶圓、封裝到機櫃等各層級產能均吃緊。
• 和碩通過配息4元，AI伺服器業務預計較去年呈現10倍數成長，人力規模可能增加3至4倍。
• 童子賢澄清，市場傳出輝達入股景碩的傳聞，目前並無此事。
news.Keywords: 台股評價,AI浪潮,供應鏈核心,AI伺服器,基本面支撐

news.Title: 台股「高空彈跳」瞬間爆殺逾千點！專家曝「這指標」是趨吉避凶良藥：用過都說讚

news.AI_Summary:

• 全日上下震盪逾1500點，財經作家狄驤認為這是高乖離時期常見的狀況，更容易受利空影響並放大波動。
• 狄驤建議觀察低乖離進場的好時機，尋找被錯殺的好企業，並強調遵守紀律的重要性。
• 報導指出，伊朗革命衛隊對發動襲擊的美軍空軍基地進行了打擊，市場反應直接，油價上漲，台股迅速拉回。
• 狄驤認為乖離率是趨吉避凶的良藥，能幫助投資人理解市場運作邏輯與人性。
news.Keywords: 台股震盪,高乖離,利空影響,市場波動,紀律投資

news.Title: MRVL Q1 Earnings Call Lifts AI Growth Targets
news.Content: Marvell Technology, Inc. MRVL used its first-quarter fiscal 2027 earnings call to deliver a bigger message than a routine beat. Management raised its revenue outlook for both fiscal 2027 and fiscal 2028, pointing to stronger AI-driven demand across interconnect, switching and custom silicon. The call mattered because executives framed the demand surge as broadening, not narrowing. Analyst questions then pushed management to defend how durable that growth could be, especially in custom silicon and scale-up networking. MRVL Pushes Revenue Targets Higher Chairman and chief executive officer Matthew J. Murphy said Marvell now expects fiscal 2027 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Marvell Technology (MRVL) raised its revenue outlook for fiscal years 2027 and 2028, citing stronger AI-driven demand across interconnect, switching, and custom silicon.
• Fiscal 2027 revenue is now projected to reach nearly $11.5 billion (up ~40% YoY), and fiscal 2028 revenue target is raised to $16.5 billion (up ~45% YoY).
• First-quarter revenue was $2.42 billion (up 28% YoY), with data center revenue accounting for 76% and growing 27% YoY.
• The company highlighted an expanded relationship with NVIDIA, spanning optical connectivity, NVLink fusion, and AI radio access network infrastructure.
• Marvell is investing in acquisitions and supply chain prepayments to support growth and capacity, aiming to offer a fuller system-level stack for AI infrastructure.
news.Keywords: AI demand, revenue outlook, data center, custom silicon, supply chain

news.Title: AI泡沫化？和碩董座童子賢：台股不算過熱、AI浪潮還不到30
news.Content: 【緯來新聞網】和碩今日召開股東會，面對台股近期頻創新高、AI概念股熱度持續升溫，董事長 童子賢 罕見針對股市發表看法。他認為，若從企業獲利 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 和碩董事長童子賢認為，以企業獲利與本益比觀察，目前台股仍處於合理區間，不算過熱。
• 他指出，AI浪潮可能連30%階段都還不到，未來數年仍將持續推動全球數位化與智慧化發展。
• 童子賢以2000年網路產業崛起為例，認為AI也正朝相同方向發展，將提升數位裝置的效率與智慧化程度。
• 台灣位於全球AI供應鏈核心，發展高附加價值產業是重要競爭優勢。
• 和碩股東會通過每股配發4元現金股利，今年AI伺服器業務可望較去年成長10倍。
news.Keywords: 本益比,AI浪潮,數位化,供應鏈,股利

news.Title: 聯發科Computex秀AI全布局，涵蓋Wi-Fi 8與6G技術等
news.Content: 【財訊快報／記者李純君報導】聯發科(2454)以AI Without Limits為主題，將於Computex 2026展出在AI世代下從邊緣到雲端的次世代技術與解決方案，包括最新Wi-Fi 8系列產品、賦能Agentic AI ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 聯發科將在Computex 2026展出涵蓋邊緣到雲端的次世代AI技術與解決方案，包括Wi-Fi 8、Agentic AI平台、6G、衛星通訊及資料中心技術。
• 聯發科將與NVIDIA共同展出搭載NVIDIA GB10 Grace Blackwell超級晶片的Agentic AI超級電腦NVIDIA DGX Spark，具備1 petaFLOP效能。
• 聯發科與NVIDIA將AI整合至車用平台，展出天璣座艙旗艦平台C-X1及天璣汽車連結旗艦平台MT2739，後者為全球首款支援3GPP R18 5G NR-NTN衛星通話之車載晶片組。
• 展出多款支援高階運算的應用平台，包括離線AI生成手機平板、AI生產力Chromebook、AI電視主晶片MediaTek Pentonic 800等。
• 聯發科展出400Gbps/fiber頻寬速率之共同封裝光學（CPO）技術，以及全球首款支援動態子頻段運作（DSO）技術的Wi-Fi 8晶片組Filogic 8800。
news.Keywords: AI,邊緣運算,Wi-Fi 8,6G,車用平台

news.Title: Meet the Spectacular Vanguard ETF With 45.8% of Its Portfolio Parked in Nvidia, Alphabet, Apple, and Microsoft
news.Content: The CRSP U.S. Total Market Index is made up of all 3,498 companies listed on American stock exchanges. However, the 59 largest companies represent a staggering 70% of the index's total market capitalization, highlighting the extreme concentration of wealth in the corporate sector. The CRSP U.S. Mega Cap Growth Index exclusively holds those 59 companies. Its top four positions are Nvidia , Apple , Alphabet , and Microsoft , which isn't a surprise given their enormous combined market cap of ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The Vanguard Mega Cap Growth ETF (MGK) has 45.8% of its portfolio concentrated in its top four holdings: Nvidia, Apple, Alphabet, and Microsoft.
• These four companies, with a combined market cap of $17.4 trillion, are at the forefront of the AI revolution, supplying chips, integrating AI into devices, and embedding AI assistants into software.
• Nvidia's new Vera Rubin platform aims to reduce AI deployment costs, Apple's AI features in 2.5 billion devices could drive consumer adoption, Alphabet's AI Overviews enhance search, and Microsoft's Copilot is integrated into its software suite.
• The ETF has delivered a compound annual return of 13.6% since 2007, outperforming the S&P 500's 10.3% average annual return, driven by the strong performance of these AI-focused tech giants.
news.Keywords: ETF concentration, Mega Cap Growth, AI revolution, portfolio weighting, technology sector

news.Title: 台股有過熱? 童子賢：本益比22到28倍還不算
news.Content:
[ 非凡新聞 ]記者黃靖棻,攝影邱文傑

即將在下週一登場的輝達GTC大會，擔任暖場直播的重量級嘉賓，今年首度多了和碩董事長童子賢和緯創董事長林憲銘，隨著AI伺服器需求爆發，台灣代工廠 ...

news.Title: 亞太牛市下半場！日股波段漲幅落後台韓 2026下半年將掀補漲效應
news.Content: 全球生成式AI浪潮與半導體景氣大復甦，在過去三年半催生出歷史級的亞太「大牛市」。然而，根據最新統計數據，這場引領全球的科技瘋狂中，亞太三地市場的上漲節奏出現了奇妙的分流。自2023年以來，南韓KOSPI指數憑藉AI HB ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 自2023年以來，南韓KOSPI指數漲幅超過260%，台灣加權指數漲幅超過207%，日本日經225指數漲幅約152.1%。
• 分析指出，日股目前的基期與估值更具投資防禦性，預計2026年下半年將有補漲效應。
• 台韓股市受惠於AI成品晶片，而日本在AI產業中扮演「隱形軍火商」，握有半導體材料與設備的關鍵市佔率。

• 東京證券交易所推行公司治理改革，加上日本經濟擺脫通縮，預計將吸引海外資金流入，日股具備補漲潛力。
news.Keywords: 亞太股市,AI,半導體供應鏈,補漲效應,公司治理

news.Title: Amazon Just Delivered Mind-Boggling News to Shareholders
news.Content: Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) has been one of the early winners of the artificial intelligence (AI) boom, as a user and developer of the technology. Through its e-commerce business, the company has applied AI systems to its fulfillment network to increase speed and efficiency and has been offering AI tools to customers as they shop. At the same time, Amazon Web Services (AWS), the cloud business, designs and sells AI products to its customers. All of this is supercharging revenue now, and it may boost profit and lower costs for the company over the long run. So, Amazon has already been ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Amazon's e-commerce and AWS businesses are benefiting significantly from the AI boom, with AI enhancing fulfillment efficiency and providing AI tools to customers.
• AWS, Amazon's biggest profit driver, accounted for 60% of its operating income last quarter and is the world's largest cloud provider, well-positioned for AI-driven growth.
• Amazon is designing its own AI chips (Trainium and Graviton) to meet high demand, offer cost-effective solutions, and save billions in capital expenditures annually.
• CEO Andy Jassy highlighted AWS's strong position in both AI and CPU workloads with its custom chips, and the company offers Nvidia GPUs, positioning AWS as a comprehensive AI solution provider with a $150 billion annual revenue run rate.
news.Keywords: Artificial Intelligence, AWS, cloud computing, custom silicon, revenue growth

news.Title: Q1 Earnings Season Is Winding Down. Here Are the 5 Stocks That Defined It.
news.Content: Earnings season isn't officially over yet. But with 95% of the S&P 500 's (SNPINDEX: ^GSPC) companies' first-quarter numbers now in hand -- including all the major ones investors were most interested in -- Q1 earnings season is effectively over. Overall, it was a pretty good quarter. Data from FactSet indicates 84% of the S&P 500's constituents were on pace to beat their earnings estimates, contributing to year-over-year Q1 profit growth of 27.7%. The broader investor takeaways from Q1's earnings reports, however, can be illustrated by just five companies' quarterly reports. Will ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Overall Q1 earnings season for the S&P 500 showed strong performance, with 84% of companies beating earnings estimates and a year-over-year profit growth of 27.7%.
• Alphabet reported 19% year-over-year revenue growth, with its cloud computing arm (offering AI solutions) outperforming, and advertising revenue accelerating to over 15%.
• Meta Platforms exceeded revenue and profit expectations, but its stock declined due to slower user growth (4% YoY) and increased AI infrastructure capital expenditure guidance ($125-$145 billion).
• The performance of these companies illustrates key investor takeaways: advertisers are increasing spending, and markets remain sensitive to aggressive AI investments without clear ROI.
news.Keywords: Q1 Earnings, Revenue Growth, AI Investment, Advertiser Sentiment, Capital Expenditures

news.Title: SpaceX Could Soon Be Worth $2 Trillion. This $66 Metric Is the One to Watch
news.Content: Many investors are chomping at the bit to buy shares in a slew of upcoming IPOs, including OpenAI, Anthropic, and SpaceX. The recent debut of the artificial intelligence semiconductor company Cerebras , which raised $5.5 billion from its IPO and saw its share price surge 68% on the first day of trading, shows just how eager some investors are for new tech stocks. SpaceX -- which is run by Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) CEO Elon Musk -- is rapidly approaching its June 12 IPO and could raise up to $75 billion in the offering. That would give SpaceX a valuation of ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SpaceX's upcoming IPO is projected to value the company between $1.75 trillion and $2 trillion, potentially making it the largest IPO ever.
• While SpaceX aims for Mars colonization, its primary revenue source (over 60% in 2025) is the Starlink satellite internet business.
• Starlink's Average Revenue Per User (ARPU) has declined by 33% from 2023 to Q1 2026, with further decreases expected due to international expansion.
• Despite falling ARPU, SpaceX's Connectivity segment saw a 120% increase in operating income to $4.4 billion and an 86% rise in EBITDA to $7.1 billion in 2025.
• Starlink customer numbers surged by 347% from 2.3 million in 2023 to 10.3 million, indicating strong subscriber growth.
news.Keywords: IPO valuation, Starlink, ARPU decline, subscriber growth, operational efficiency

news.Title: The Stock Market Just Did Something for the 2nd Time in 100 Years, and History Says What Comes Next
news.Content: The past two months have been nothing short of incredible for the stock market. At recent prices, the Dow Jones Industrial Average is up 12% since March 30, while the S&P 500 (SNPINDEX: ^GSPC) is up 18.5%, and the tech-heavy Nasdaq Composite is up a whopping 28% as artificial intelligence (AI) euphoria reaches a fever pitch. But as exciting as the rally ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The stock market has experienced a significant rally, with the Dow Jones up 12%, S&P 500 up 18.5%, and Nasdaq up 28% in the past two months, driven by AI euphoria.
• The Shiller CAPE ratio has crossed 40 for only the second time in 100 years, indicating a potentially overvalued market.
• The historical average CAPE ratio is around 17, suggesting the current market is trading at more than double its long-run norm.
• The last time the CAPE ratio exceeded 40 was in 1999, at the peak of the dot-com bubble.
• Historically, elevated CAPE ratios have led to poor subsequent market returns, with low single-digit average annual returns expected over the following decade when the ratio is above 30.
news.Keywords: CAPE ratio, market valuation, historical returns, dot-com bubble, investor caution

news.Title: Exclusive-ByteDance developing custom CPU chips to support AI rollout, sources say
news.Content: By Liam Mo and Fanny Potkin BEIJING/PARIS, May 28 (Reuters) - Chinese technology giant ByteDance is developing its own central processing units (CPUs) to support its growing AI infrastructure needs, three people familiar with the matter said, as surging chip prices and prolonged supply ‌shortages constrain its expansion plans. The move underscores the industry's rapid shift toward "inference," where AI ...
news.AI_Summary:
• ByteDance is developing custom CPUs to address AI infrastructure needs, driven by rising chip prices and supply shortages.
• This move aligns with hyperscalers like Google, Amazon, and Microsoft who are also developing custom CPUs to reduce costs and tailor performance.
• ByteDance is pursuing two CPU architecture tracks: Arm and RISC-V, to best suit its long-term data center requirements.
• Intel has warned of up to six-month delivery lead times for server CPUs, and AMD notes a tight global CPU market with demand outpacing supply.
• ByteDance has seen significant quarter-over-quarter price increases (10-35%) for CPUs from Intel and AMD, accelerating its push for in-house alternatives.
news.Keywords: Custom silicon, CPU development, AI infrastructure, supply chain constraints, hyperscaler trend

news.Title: Micron Is Nearing $1,000. Is a Stock Split Next?
news.Content: Micron's (NASDAQ: MU) scorching hot run isn't over yet. Micron has now topped $1 trillion in market value, putting it in an elite stock club along with the " Magnificent Seven " ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Micron's stock has surged, reaching over $900 per share and nearing $1,000, following a price target increase to $1,650 by UBS.
• The company has surpassed $1 trillion in market value, joining an elite group of tech companies.
• Micron has not split its stock since the dot-com era, with its last split occurring in 2000.
• A stock split is being considered due to the high share price, which could make the stock more accessible to retail investors and signal management confidence.
• Analysts project Micron's revenue to jump 194% to $110 billion this fiscal year and grow another 58% in fiscal 2027, with demand continuing to outstrip supply.
news.Keywords: Stock split, share price appreciation, market capitalization, analyst price target, demand exceeding supply

news.Title: 台股過熱了嗎？童子賢罕見成「股市童老師」　給出「4字」定心丸
news.Content: 從來不評論股市與股價的和碩董事長 童子賢 ，今日罕見化身為「童老師」為擔心台股過熱的股民開示，他認為，從總經的角度來看，台股全年本益比只要 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 和碩董事長童子賢認為，台股全年本益比控制在25至30倍之間不算過熱，目前約25倍，相較於全球熱門股市，台灣不算過熱。
• 他指出，台灣處於AI潮流中心，產業對全球經濟有幫助，AI浪潮不會短期結束，目前的台股有其價值。
• 童子賢預估今年全年上市櫃公司獲利將超過6兆元，換算本益比約25倍，即使上漲也可能僅28倍，不構成過熱。
• 他認為個別企業高本益比代表前景被高度看好，與台股整體過熱無關，並強調台灣應專注生產高附加價值產品。
news.Keywords: 台股, 本益比, AI趨勢, 童子賢, 總經角度

news.Title: 童子賢：台股本益比全年控制在20至30倍不算過熱 現階段AI發展不到30%
news.Content: 台股屢創新高，市場擔心出現過熱跡象。和碩董事長 童子賢 今天（28日）罕見對股市發表看法，他認為關鍵指標是本益比，台股目前本益比約22到28倍，若全年控制在2 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 和碩董事長童子賢認為，台股本益比全年控制在20至30倍之間不算過熱，目前約22至28倍。
• 他強調，AI產業發展尚處早期階段，現階段發展連30%都不到，未來幾年將逐漸發酵，對全球經濟有幫助。
• 童子賢表示，台灣處於AI潮流中心，應專注生產高附加價值產品，而非回到過去的低附加價值出口模式。
• 他澄清和碩子公司景碩並未獲輝達（NVIDIA）入股，並認為台美關稅排除半導體是利多，台灣出口並未涉及不公平競爭。
news.Keywords: 台股, AI發展, 本益比, 童子賢, 附加價值

news.Title: 台股狂飆卻先獲利了結？她認「將資金慢慢放口袋」 內行人曝：不要預測漲跌
news.Content:
[ FTNN新聞網 ]實習記者鄭巧薰／綜合報導

台股近期氣勢如虹，不少個股接連亮燈漲停。不過，卻有一名網友坦言，自己近期已開始陸續將資金 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 有網友表示已開始將資金獲利了結，儘管看到飆股上漲感到煎熬，但認為「寧願少賺也不要一根下殺時跑不掉」。
• 許多投資人對此表示共鳴，分享自己也開始逐步獲利了結，保留部分現金，認為「入袋才算數」。
• 部分網友提醒，不要預測漲跌，但要有自己的交易策略，保留現金是種策略，盲目追高被套牢得不償失。
• 討論顯示，部分投資人對市場過熱感到擔憂，選擇提前獲利了結以規避風險。
news.Keywords: 獲利了結, 資金配置, 交易策略, 市場過熱, 投資心態

news.Title: 早盤暴漲700、午盤狂瀉900！主力狂拉台積電背後藏殺機「專家點名3類人最慘」短線最強避風港看低基期股
news.Content: 受到美股與台積電ADR創新高的激勵，台積電（2330）飆上2,360元的歷史新天價，台股今（28）日早盤暴漲逾700點，然午盤後利調節賣壓傾巢而出，驚見大跳水急殺，一度急殺超過900點，盤中上 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股早盤受台積電及聯發科 ADR 創新高激勵，指數一度飆漲逾 700 點，但午盤後出現劇烈修正，指數一度重挫超過 900 點。
• 分析師指出，早盤上漲主要由台積電、聯發科等權值股拉抬，中小型股早已失血，盤面結構呈現極端分歧。
• 午盤後，權值股轉弱，資金未能有效外溢至其他族群，引發程式交易停損及當沖客退場的連鎖效應，導致指數崩跌。
• 聯發科、台達電、智邦等指標股午盤後重挫，盤中高價股也大幅回檔，顯示市場過熱後出現獲利了結賣壓。
• 建議投資人嚴格執行停損，提高現金部位，並聚焦低基期記憶體、金控及傳產等相對抗跌的族群。
news.Keywords: 指數震盪,權值股,中小型股,獲利了結,避險

news.Title: 聯發科前進COMPUTEX　展示邊緣AI和雲端方案
news.Content: （中央社記者張建中新竹2026年5月28日電）IC設計廠聯發科 (2454) 今天宣布，將在COMPUTEX 2026展出邊緣人工智慧（AI）到雲端的次世代技術與解決方案，包括WiFi 8系列產品、6G、衛星通訊以及先進資料中心 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 聯發科將於 COMPUTEX 2026 展示其邊緣 AI 到雲端的次世代技術與解決方案，涵蓋 WiFi 8、6G、衛星通訊及先進資料中心等前瞻技術。
• 公司總經理陳冠州表示，聯發科在代理式 AI 趨勢下，從邊緣端至雲端皆具優勢，將持續與夥伴加速實現 AI 的普及。
• 聯發科將與輝達（NVIDIA）合作展出搭載 NVIDIA GB10 Grace Blackwell 超級晶片的代理式 AI 超級電腦 NVIDIA DGX Spark。
• 展品還包括支援 NVIDIA AI 與遊戲技術的天璣座艙旗艦平台 C-X1，以及支援 5G NR-NTN 衛星通話的天璣汽車連結旗艦平台 MT2739。
• 聯發科亦將展示支援離線 AI 生成的手機與平板平台、AI 生產力應用的 Chromebook 平台，以及涵蓋端到端 AI 資料中心平台的解決方案。
news.Keywords: 邊緣AI,雲端方案,COMPUTEX,次世代技術,人工智慧

news.Title: 聯發科助攻馬斯克？有望成特斯拉AI超級晶圓廠夥伴  郭明錤揭「隱形實力」狂加分
news.Content: 聯發科獲得Google大單，引爆新一波外資調升估值行情，摩根士丹利（大摩）日前率先將聯發科目標價調高至5088元新天價。與此同時，天風國際證券分析師郭明錤釋出最新產業調查指出，聯發科可能成為特斯拉執行長馬斯克（Elo ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 分析師郭明錤指出，聯發科可能成為特斯拉執行長馬斯克打造「Terafab（超級晶圓廠）」的關鍵客製化晶片（ASIC）策略合作夥伴。
• 聯發科將全面支援英特爾 14A 先進製程與先進封裝，預計自 2028 年開始小量生產馬斯克團隊所需的晶片。
• 聯發科具備與英特爾合作經驗（投片 Intel 16、參與 EMIB-T 先進封裝），熟悉其合作模式，能協助 Terafab 加速技術導入。
• 聯發科與 Google 合作的 TPU 晶片開發進度超預期，證明其具備 Semi-COT 模式、EMIB-T 生產協同能力及 Tier-1 量產經驗。
• 聯發科亦是馬斯克旗下星鏈（Starlink）用戶端的 Wi-Fi 與路由器晶片供應商，具備驗證優勢，並能導入台灣特有的加速研發生態系。
news.Keywords: 客製化ASIC,超級晶圓廠,Terafab,英特爾製程,供應鏈合作

news.Title: 大怒神！台股創高後狂震1500點 台積電下殺翻黑
news.Content: 台股今（27）日上演大幅震盪行情，最高一度衝上44954.09點，再創歷史新高。然而，由於短線漲幅過大，加上市場傳出美伊戰事再度升 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股今日上演大幅震盪行情，盤中最高衝上 44954.09 點創歷史新高，但隨後因短線漲幅過大及美伊戰事傳聞引發避險情緒，由紅翻黑，最低下探 43378.24 點。
• 單日高低震盪高達 1575 點，「44K」關卡失守，市場出現獲利了結賣壓。
• 權值股走跌，台積電一度衝上 2360 元天價後翻黑，聯發科、台達電也分別下跌 6.25% 及 4.56%。

• 資金轉趨保守，市場擔憂國際情勢變化影響股市表現。

news.Title: Nvidia Stock Has Struggled Over the Last Week. Here's What I Think Is Going On.
news.Content: Shares of artificial intelligence (AI) chipmaker Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) have struggled lately. The stock closed at about $213 on Wednesday, down about 6% over the past week and off about 10% from an all-time high of $236.54 earlier this month. That weakness comes despite a fiscal first-quarter report on May 20 that, by almost any measure, was outstanding. Revenue rose 85% year over year to a ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia's stock has experienced a recent decline of about 6% over the past week, despite an outstanding fiscal first-quarter report.
• The company reported record revenue of $81.6 billion, an 85% year-over-year increase, with data center revenue climbing 92% to $75.2 billion.
• Nvidia raised its quarterly dividend and authorized an additional $80 billion in share repurchases.
• Concerns include the increasing concentration of top customers (64% of accounts receivable) and a significant increase in inventory and supply commitments ($145 billion).
• Data center product shipments to mainland China were nil in the quarter, compared to $4.6 billion in the prior year.
news.Keywords: Stock pullback, earnings beat, customer concentration, inventory build, China revenue impact

news.Title: SpaceX Could Be Worth More Than Tesla the Moment It Goes Public. Here's Why.
news.Content: SpaceX is gearing up for what could be the largest initial public offering (IPO) in history. The rocket and satellite specialist publicly filed its S-1 with the Securities and Exchange Commission last week, and reports point to a Nasdaq debut under the ticker SPCX as soon as June 12. Pricing is expected the night before, with the investor roadshow kicking off in early June. The targeted valuation: somewhere between $1.75 trillion and $2 trillion. That range is notable because it would put SpaceX above Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) -- the electric vehicle and ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SpaceX is preparing for a potential IPO valuing it between $1.75 trillion and $2 trillion, which would exceed Tesla's current market capitalization of approximately $1.65 trillion.
• SpaceX's Starlink segment generated $11.4 billion in revenue in 2025, up nearly 50% year-over-year, with operating income doubling to $4.4 billion.
• Starlink subscriber numbers have grown significantly, reaching 10.3 million users, though average revenue per subscriber has decreased to about $66 per month.
• Tesla experienced its first annual revenue decline in 2025 and faces increased capital expenditures ($25 billion+) for AI compute and new products.
• Tesla's automotive business contracted in 2025, and its energy segment saw a 12% revenue decline in Q1 2026, while trading at a high P/E ratio of around 400.
news.Keywords: IPO valuation, Starlink revenue, subscriber growth, Tesla revenue decline, capital expenditure

news.Title: 世界先進：下半年景氣應優於上半年　產能供不應求
news.Content: （中央社記者張建中新竹2026年5月28日電）晶圓代工廠世界先進 (5 ...
news.AI_Summary:

• 目前水、電、材料、人力及產能需求均在增加，世界先進會小心應對。
• 客戶下單情況積極，因目前產能滿載，客戶為確保產能仍持續下單。
• 人工智慧（AI）需求及發展趨勢是預期下半年景氣向上的關鍵因素。

news.Title: Why IREN Stock Popped Today
news.Content: Shares of IREN Limited (NASDAQ: IREN) climbed on Wednesday after the artificial intelligence (AI) data center developer struck a deal with Dell Technologies (NYSE: DELL) . ...
news.AI_Summary:
• IREN Limited's stock rose following a $1.6 billion deal with Dell Technologies for Nvidia's Blackwell systems.
• The purchase includes Nvidia GPUs, Dell servers, storage, networking, and ancillary equipment, to be deployed in IREN's Texas data centers by early 2027.
• IREN emphasizes rapid deployment speed as a competitive advantage in the AI data center market.
• The company aims to accelerate its expansion schedule by aggressively investing in computing resources.
• Securing capacity and hastening commissioning are top priorities for IREN in a market where time-to-compute is critical.
news.Keywords: AI data center, GPU purchase, rapid deployment, infrastructure investment, time-to-compute

news.Title: Sandisk Has Climbed From $36 to $1,590 in a Year. What the AI Memory Boom Means for the Stock From Here.
news.Content: Up more than 4,000% over the past year and about 570% so far in 2026, Sandisk (NASDAQ: SNDK) stock has been one of the most extraordinary winners in the artificial intelligence (AI) build-out. The NAND flash memory specialist, which only began trading on its own in February 2025 after being spun off from Western Digital , has climbed from a 52-week low of about $36 to a closing price near $1,590 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Sandisk (SNDK) stock has surged over 4,000% in the past year, reaching an all-time high market value above $230 billion.
• The company's fiscal third-quarter revenue jumped 251% year-over-year to $5.95 billion, with non-GAAP gross margin reaching 78.4%.
• Data center revenue grew 645% year-over-year to $1.47 billion, driven by a redirection of bit supply towards AI infrastructure customers.
• Sandisk has implemented New Business Models (NBMs) with multi-year supply contracts and financial guarantees totaling over $42 billion in remaining performance obligations.
• The stock's high valuation (P/E ratio above 50) prices in significant future earnings growth, but historical NAND market cyclicality and competition pose risks.
news.Keywords: Memory boom, AI demand, revenue acceleration, NBM contracts, valuation risk

news.Title: 分紅爭議燒不完？ 他發文直諫魏哲家 員工最不滿「這件事」
news.Content: 「護國神山」台積電（TSMC）近日因傳出調降員工分紅15%，引發員工強烈不滿。對此，公司董事長魏哲家特別取消前往荷蘭的行程，親自與員工舉辦QA座談會。魏哲家坦言，今年分紅總額將比去年增加三成，並強調「台積電分紅沒有天花板」，對公司 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台積電因傳出調降員工分紅 15% 引發員工不滿，董事長魏哲家舉辦 QA 座談會，坦言今年分紅總額將增加三成。
• 獨立媒體 Culpium 創辦人高燦鳴認為，此事件是台積電「有史以來最大的危機」，員工最不滿的是魏哲家去年總薪酬飆升至7800萬美元。
• 魏哲家提出四大方針：調整分紅分配、年度調薪優先基層、確保不裁員、利潤投入 ESG，並鼓勵員工將分紅轉為投資自家股票。
• 高燦鳴指出，魏哲家薪酬增長速度超過員工中位數，且其薪資佔淨利比例增加，與台灣員工希望管理階層與普通員工薪酬相對平等的期望有落差。
• 事件凸顯公司治理與員工關係的脆弱，若處理不當恐衍生人才流失和信任裂痕，成為未來全球競爭的隱憂。
news.Keywords: 員工分紅,薪酬爭議,公司治理,人才流失,員工信任

news.Title: 聯發科這局贏很大？ 郭明錤揭秘：馬斯克宇宙算力的關鍵拼圖
news.Content: 聯發科有望成為馬斯克Terafab關鍵拼圖，郭明錤揭秘其將全面支援Intel 14A先進製程，雙方計畫於2028年小量生產晶片。憑藉與Intel合作經驗、Google TPU實績及台灣「夜鷹」研發生態系，聯發科將助Te ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 分析師郭明錤指出，聯發科有望成為馬斯克 Terafab 超級晶圓廠的關鍵合作夥伴，將支援 Intel 14A 先進製程，預計 2028 年小量生產晶片。
• 聯發科具備與 Intel 合作經驗、與 Google 合作 TPU 的實績，以及台灣「夜鷹」研發生態系，能助 Terafab 加速研發與生產。
• 馬斯克的 IC 設計團隊面臨產品線、時間與人力等多重執行壓力，急需 ASIC 廠商協助導入英特爾 14A 製程與先進封裝。
• 聯發科因熟悉英特爾合作模式、具備 Tier-1 量產經驗，且是星鏈 Wi-Fi 晶片供應商，成為 Terafab 的最佳選擇。
• 透過台灣獨有的半導體生態系加速研發模式，聯發科能有效強化 Terafab 的執行效率，搶佔生產窗口。
news.Keywords: 客製化ASIC,超級晶圓廠,Terafab,Intel 14A製程,台灣研發生態系

• 專家點名聯發科與台達電為繼台積電之後的「新神山」，市值分別超過7.4兆及6.5兆新台幣。
• 聯發科積極轉型，切入AI ASIC供應鏈，市值已超越中國大型企業，挑戰國際大廠地位。
• 台達電在HVDC領域表現強勢，市值已超越鴻海，並帶動泰國子公司泰達電股價上漲近100%。

news.Title: Tesla's Optimus robot plan hits major snag
news.Content: Tesla CEO Elon Musk let investors know early on that 2026 would be an expensive year for the company. Coming off of its first-ever decline in revenue and its second consecutive year of falling deliveries in 2025, 2026 was always going to be a pivotal year for the electric vehicle maker. Musk already says Tesla ( TSLA ) is much more than a car company, so when the company raised its capital expenditure forecast to over $25 billion for mostly non-car-related development, most analysts didn't blink ( though some did ). A significant portion ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Tesla is retooling car production capacity to manufacture 1 million Optimus humanoid robots annually, requiring significant capital expenditure.
• The company faces a major challenge in generating demand for its $20,000-$30,000 Optimus robots, with production slated for late 2027 at the earliest.
• Optimus production requires a completely new supply chain and a lengthy process to install and test new production lines.
• Tesla's automotive business, accounting for 73% of revenue, saw its first annual revenue decline in 2025 and second consecutive year of falling deliveries.
• Despite a pivot towards autonomy and robots, the core automotive business remains Tesla's primary revenue driver, facing challenges with declining sales and high P/E ratios.
news.Keywords: Optimus robot, demand generation, capital expenditure, production ramp, automotive revenue decline

news.Title: Forget Micron for a Second: This Storage Maker Just Crossed a Profitability Milestone and Raised Its Dividend 20%
news.Content: Memory specialist Micron Technology has rightly grabbed much of the spotlight in recent conversations about how artificial intelligence (AI) is reshaping the broader storage industry. But while investors talk about Micron, another company in the data storage space has quietly put together one of the more striking financial inflections in hardware. Western Digital (NASDAQ: WDC) -- now operating as a pure-play hard disk drive maker after spinning off its flash ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Western Digital reported fiscal third-quarter revenue of $3.34 billion, a 45% year-over-year increase, accelerating from previous quarters.
• The company achieved a milestone with its non-GAAP gross margin reaching 50.5%, the first time it has exceeded 50%.
• Adjusted earnings per share nearly doubled year over year to $2.72, driven by a 9% rise in average selling price per exabyte and a 34% increase in exabytes sold.
• Western Digital raised its quarterly cash dividend by 20% to $0.15 per share, following a previous 25% increase.
• Management provided a positive outlook, expecting fiscal fourth-quarter revenue of about $3.65 billion (40% year-over-year growth) and an adjusted gross margin of 51%-52%.
news.Keywords: profitability milestone, dividend increase, revenue growth, gross margin expansion, AI demand

news.Title: Barclays resets SanDisk stock price target after earnings
news.Content: Sandisk was trading near $36 twelve months ago. It has since done something that most stocks never do in a lifetime. And on May 27, one of Wall Street 's major banks looked at that run and decided the story was not finished. The argument it made for why is more specific than most investors are expecting. What Barclays changed and the analyst behind the call Barclays analyst Tom O'Malley upgraded SanDisk (SNDK) to Overweight from Equal-weight and raised his price target to $2,300 from $1,200 on May 27. The new target implies ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Barclays upgraded SanDisk (SNDK) to Overweight from Equal-weight and raised its price target to $2,300 from $1,200, implying 45% upside.
• The upgrade is based on SanDisk's 'aggressive and structurally innovative' contracting model, securing $42 billion in minimum contractual revenue and $11 billion in financial guarantees.
• These contracts offer 'demand certainty' and 'supply assurance', with durations extending to 2031, reducing binary risk.
• Barclays views Memory/Storage as the most attractive vertical behind AI accelerators, expecting supply-demand imbalance to persist through 2027.
• The firm also raised Micron's price target, indicating a broader positive view on the memory upcycle.
news.Keywords: analyst upgrade, price target increase, contractual revenue, demand certainty, supply-demand imbalance

news.Title: 聯發科快追上高通 台達電市值破6.5兆 謝金河：從一人武林變群山效應
news.Content: 財信傳媒董事長謝金河27日在 臉書 感念已故好友范疇，驚嘆其五年前精準預測台灣將因國際變局成為「風雲國家」。如今台股市值超越印度，聯發科與台達電雙雙晉升兩千億美元級巨頭，不僅印證先知灼見，更宣告台灣已從「一人的 ...

• 此現象印證了五年前對台灣將成為「風雲國家」的預測。

news.Title: If You'd Invested $100 in Micron Technology Stock 1 Year Ago, Here's How Much You'd Have Today
news.Content: Micron Technology (NASDAQ: MU) has become one of the hottest names in the tech sector. While advanced graphics processing units (GPUs) from Nvidia and other players continue to ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Micron Technology (MU) stock has surged 704% over the past year, turning a $100 investment into $804.
• The rally is driven by soaring demand for its High-Bandwidth Memory (HBM) chips, crucial components for AI GPUs.
• Micron has sold out its HBM production capacity for the current year, with strong demand expected to continue into 2027.

news.Title: Google Engineer Charged With Insider Trading on Polymarket
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- A Google software engineer was charged with insider trading on Polymarket, where he allegedly made more than $1 million betting on one of last year’s most popular Internet searches. Most Read from Bloomberg Singapore Hands Byju's Founder His First Ever Jail Term Iran’s Khamenei Says No Going Back for Middle East Rocked by War Ex-President Biden Sues to Stop DOJ Sharing Interview Tapes Two More Oil Supertankers Exit Hormuz to Help Push Up ...
news.AI_Summary:
• A Google software engineer, Michele Spagnuolo, has been charged with insider trading on Polymarket, allegedly making over $1 million.
• The engineer allegedly used confidential company data on user searches to bet on Google's most-searched person in 2025.
• Spagnuolo allegedly made around $1.2 million when D4vd was publicly announced as the top-searched person, a result with 'near-zero probability' in the market.
• Google stated the employee's actions are a serious breach of policy and has placed the employee on leave.
• The Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) filed a parallel civil lawsuit seeking penalties and recovery of illicit profits.
news.Keywords: insider trading, prediction markets, confidential information, regulatory action, breach of policy

news.Title: US charges Google engineer with insider trading on Polymarket

news.AI_Summary:
• A Google software engineer, Michele Spagnuolo, has been charged by the U.S. Justice Department with using insider information to profit on Polymarket.
• Spagnuolo allegedly earned $1.2 million by betting on Google's most-searched list using confidential company data, including a bet on musician D4vd.
• The bets were placed on a prediction market where D4vd had a 'near-zero probability' of topping the list.
• Google confirmed the employee's actions are a serious breach of company policy and has placed the individual on leave.
• Prosecutors emphasized their commitment to pursuing corporate insiders who exploit confidential information for profit.
news.Keywords: insider trading, prediction market, confidential data, regulatory charges, policy violation

news.Title: Pope Leo XIV teams with Anthropic founder on bold AI warning
news.Content: When the people building something stand next to the people warning about it, that usually means everyone in the room is worried about the same thing. For most of the past three years, the artificial intelligence conversation has split cleanly into two camps. The builders keep raising bigger funding rounds and shipping bigger models. The critics keep arguing the technology is moving faster than anyone can govern. The market has mostly sided with the builders, and the price action has rewarded that bet. Nvidia ( NVDA ) crossed $5 trillion in market value last fall. Microsoft ( MSFT ), Alphabet ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Pope Leo XIV released an encyclical warning about the rapid development and potential dangers of artificial intelligence.
• The Pope called for the 'disarming' of AI and urged governments to slow its development due to risks of misinformation and conflict.
• Chris Olah, co-founder of Anthropic, shared the stage with the Pope, acknowledging that AI labs operate within incentives that can conflict with ethical considerations.
• Olah also highlighted concerns about AI displacing human labor at scale and the unsettling aspects of current AI systems.
• The article notes Anthropic's significant recent funding rounds and high private valuation, contrasting with the Pope's cautionary message.
news.Keywords: AI ethics, papal encyclical, AI regulation, labor displacement, frontier AI

news.Title: Microchip Technology Sees Demand Rebound, Margin Gains as Bookings Hit 4-Year High
news.Content: Key Points Interested in Microchip Technology Incorporated? Here are five stocks we like better. Microchip Technology says demand has rebounded broadly, with April bookings hitting the highest monthly level in nearly four years and book-to-bill remaining above 1, signaling a sustained recovery. The company is seeing margin improvement as production ramps and underutilization costs fall, while revenue for fiscal 2026 rose 35% and quarterly EPS improved sharply from $0.11 to $0.57. Microchip is not planning a broad price increase, instead focusing on regaining market share and rebuilding customer relationships, while also expanding in AI, data center, FPGA, and other megatrend ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Microchip Technology (MCHP) is experiencing a broad demand rebound, with April bookings reaching a nearly 4-year high and book-to-bill ratio above 1, indicating a sustained recovery.
• The company reported a 35% revenue increase for fiscal 2026 and a significant improvement in quarterly EPS from $0.11 to $0.57.
• Margin improvement is expected as production ramps and underutilization costs decrease; inventory levels have been reduced by approximately $320 million.
• Microchip is focusing on regaining market share and rebuilding customer relationships, with expansion in AI, data center, and FPGA markets, and seeing strong demand recovery in Asia.
news.Keywords: demand rebound, book-to-bill, margin improvement, market share, AI, data center

news.Title: Stocks Finish Mostly Higher on Iran Peace Progress
news.Content: The S&P 500 Index ($SPX) (SPY) on Tuesday closed up +0.61%, the Dow Jones Industrial Average ($DOWI) (DIA) closed down -0.23%, and the Nasdaq 100 Index ($IUXX) (QQQ) closed up +1.76%. news.Title: Arm Holdings plc (ARM) to Face US Antitrust Probe over Chip Tech, Bloomberg News Reports
news.Content: Arm Holdings plc (NASDAQ:ARM) is one of the 10 Best Performing Quantum Computing Stocks So Far in 2026 . On May 16, Reuters, citing Bloomberg News, reported that Arm Holdings plc (NASDAQ:ARM) faces a US ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Arm Holdings plc (ARM) is reportedly facing a US antitrust probe by the Federal Trade Commission (FTC) concerning its semiconductor licensing practices.
• The FTC is investigating potential illegal monopolization and whether Arm could reject or downgrade licensing agreements for its CPU blueprints.
• The probe was reportedly triggered by a 'baseless allegation of anticompetitive conduct' from Qualcomm, aimed at gaining leverage in a dispute.
• South Korea's antitrust authority has also investigated Arm's licensing practices, linked to complaints from Qualcomm.
• Arm Holdings declined to comment on the investigation.
news.Keywords: antitrust probe, FTC investigation, semiconductor licensing, monopolization, Qualcomm dispute

news.Title: SpaceX Gets the Attention, But These 4 Stocks Could Get the Returns
news.Content: Key Points Interested in Redwire Corporation? Here are five stocks we like better. Luke Lango of InvestorPlace argues that Tesla, SpaceX, X, and XAI are converging into a single AI-driven empire, and the SpaceX IPO expected in June is the catalyst that sets the whole story in motion Lango's top SpaceX-connected pick is Redwire Corporation, a space-based solar panel manufacturer he believes is positioned to capture a significant share of Elon Musk's orbital data center spending The bigger opportunity, Lango argues, isn't the SpaceX IPO itself, but the ecosystem of stocks positioned around each pillar of the empire before the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The article discusses an 'AI-driven empire' convergence involving Tesla, SpaceX, X, and xAI, with the SpaceX IPO as a potential catalyst.
• Redwire Corporation (RDW) is highlighted as a key pick, positioned to benefit from SpaceX's planned orbital data center spending.
• Orbital data centers are presented as a solution to terrestrial resource constraints, with decreasing hardware costs over time.
• Tesla's role is framed as the distribution arm for AI via autonomous vehicles and robots, with Hesai Group (HSAI) as a pick tied to its physical AI ramp.
• Other space-related stocks like Planet Labs (PL), Rocket Lab (RKLB), and AST SpaceMobile (ASTS) are mentioned as beneficiaries of the space infrastructure trend.
news.Keywords: AI ecosystem, orbital data centers, space infrastructure, autonomous vehicles, emerging technologies
